text.title: Experimentation at Scale Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example: inputs → procedure steps → final artefact matching the JSON Schema in 02-output-contract.xml.

section.title: Inputs (mocked)
section.note: Pulled per `## Prerequisites`; sources cited in `01-core-rules.xml` rationale.

section.title: Step-by-step application
section.note: 1. Preconditions check: all `## Applies If` items satisfied; no `## Skip If` items fired.
2. Inputs gathered from named sources; freshness OK.
4. Artefact produced from `templates/` rendered with real values (see Final Artefact below).

section.title: Final artefact (matches schema)
